name: Countryhumans -Meeting-
description:
—A Rare Peace—

Today, UN hosted a meeting with the majority of the countries. Surprisingly, it was calm for the majority of the meeting, enough to where they got done with the main topics earlier than expected, almost an hour and a half earlier.

So, what will you do while passing the time? Will you stir up trouble, make new friends, or just stay by yourself? The choice is yours!
creator: The_Kiwis
